original_statement: who was the next manager after george case?
mutated_statement: who was the next manager after a particular manager if that successor must have served before the predecessor?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Conditional constraint added (and logical contradiction introduced): "george case" → "a particular manager" (specific named entity → vague referent) | direct successor query → conditional/hypothetical requiring successor served before predecessor (who was the next manager after George Case? → who was the next manager after a particular manager if that successor must have served before the predecessor?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 尝试修正矛盾指令（迭代修正机制）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought和critique可见关键线索：iteration 0/1中judge_thought多次指出最初预测为空且criticize指出未使用必要函数（f_select_column等）；随后iteration 2 after_refine中链路新增simple_query参数为“Bill Adair”，并在judge_thought中给出明确推理（Bill Adair在1968任职、继Chuck Tanner后于1971再次任职，满足“继任者曾在前任之前任职”的条件）。代理先是未给出答案并被批评为步骤缺失，随后通过迭代修正查询和补充推理，得出可解结果。因此其行为属于通过迭代修正将原始矛盾/模糊问题变为可解问题并输出答案，符合“迭代修正机制”子类。
